apps.name: Journal Tracker
apps.subtitle: Sync OpenAlex journal records into Excel or CSV
apps.description: A Python CLI for syncing OpenAlex journal publications into tracker workbooks.
apps.longDescription: Journal Tracker is a Python CLI that syncs OpenAlex journal records into a structured Excel workbook and can optionally export the articles sheet as CSV. It was first built around a Turkish politics journal list, but the workflow is general enough to support other topics, journal sets, and research tracking needs.
features: Syncs journal records from OpenAlex into an Excel workbook
Appends only new records and supports idempotent re-runs
Exports the Articles sheet as CSV when requested
Ships with a sample workbook, tests, and GitHub Actions CI
